location: Dropped by Blackguard Big Boggart when killed. He starts as a non-hostile merchant NPC at Boilprawn Shack in Liurnia of the Lakes, and later relocates outside Leyndell's north wall (Capital Outskirts) if his questline progresses further.
tactics: He's peaceful until attacked — you must deliberately fight and kill him to get the weapon, which forecloses his questline (which otherwise leads into the Dung Eater storyline and a Seedbed Curse).
If missed at Boilprawn Shack, he can be found later relocated near Leyndell's Capital Outskirts with more HP.
Comes pre-equipped with the exclusive Braggart's Roar Ash of War, which cannot be obtained any other way.
Entering Volcano Manor before speaking with Rya can lock you out of his quest and wares entirely.
lore: A spherical iron fist weapon favored by Big Boggart himself, its sheer weight described as enough to shatter bone in a single blow.

builds.name: Strength brawler
builds.why: D/E Strength/Dexterity scaling with a high 101 base physical damage suits a pure Strength punch build.

builds.name: Braggart's Roar buff-bot
builds.why: The only source of the Braggart's Roar Ash of War, which boosts poise/attack and taunts enemies, useful for co-op tanking or gimmick builds.
